race.comment: Tough race to close the card. DIVINE VICKY (12) produced a real eye-catcher last start over this distance at Hawkesbury, overcoming a moderate start to flash home and miss by a whisker. Up in class but drops 4.5 kg after the allowance. Nice chance at odds. SUNDAY TYCOON (9) has won his last two, both over 1000m at Kembla, doing his best work through the line on each occasion. Maps handily just behind a strong tempo and over an extra 100m he will be hard to hold out again. TEQUILA BABY (3) raced wide without cover so her effort to be beaten four lengths first-up in Saturday company had merit. Better placed this time so a big run looks on the cards. The flying ZALE (11) was a month between runs when nailed close to home over 1200m at Wyong recently. Will go hard and give them something to catch. ASTRONOMIX (6) is a promising three-year-old back from a four-month lay-off. Trialled well recently and is talented enough to take this out.
